sqlMap.select: SELECT devSeq, devId, devType, subType, userId, token, badge, tenantId, state, pushState, regDate, isLogin, startMenu, loginTime, loginLock, isPasswordChange, extension1, extension2 FROM tbl_dev_master WHERE devId = #devId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_DEV_MASTER ( devId, devType, subType, userId, token, badge, tenantId, state, pushState, regDate, isLogin, startMenu, loginTime, loginLock, isPasswordChange, extension1, extension2 ) VALUES ( #devId#, #devType#, #subType#, #userId#, #token#, #badge#, #tenantId#, #state#, #pushState#, #regDate#, #isLogin#, #startMenu#, #loginTime#, #loginLock#, #isPasswordChange#, #extension1#, #extension2# )
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_DEV_MASTER SET devType = #devType#, subType = #subType#, userId = #userId#, token = #token#, badge = #badge#, tenantId = #tenantId#, state = #state#, pushState = #pushState#, isLogin = #isLogin#, startMenu = #startMenu#, loginTime = #loginTime#, loginLock = #loginLock#, isPasswordChange = #isPasswordChange#, extension1 = #extension1#, extension2 = #extension2# WHERE devId = #devId#

select.isEmpty:
SELECT cn, password, displayname, displayname2, department, description, description2, title, title2, physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, company, company2, updatedt, extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, telephonenumber, mail, extensionattribute10 as jikchek, tenant_id, (SELECT concat('top,Top,', dept_cd_path) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = a.department AND tenant_id = #tenantId#) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND UPPER(property_name) = 'PRIMARYLANG') AS primaryLang, loginCnt, extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, extensionattribute14 as sabun, password_updatedt FROM TBL_USERMASTER a WHERE (cn = #id# OR extensionattribute14 = #id#) AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
password = #password#
select.isNotEmpty:
SELECT u.cn, u.password, u.displayname, u.displayname2, d.cn department, d.displayname description, d.displayname2 description2, case u.department when #deptID# then u.title else (select title from tbl_addjobmaster where cn = #id# and deptid = #deptID# and tenant_id = #tenantId#) end as title, case u.department when #deptID# then u.title2 else (select title2 from tbl_addjobmaster where cn = #id# and deptid = #deptID# and tenant_id = #tenantId#) end as title2, d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 companyid, d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 company, d.COMPNM2 company2, u.updatedt, case u.department when #deptID# then u.extensionattribute1 else 'c=0;k=0;g=0;a=0;i=0;n=0;l=0;w=0;m=0;' end as rollinfo, u.telephonenumber, u.mail, u.extensionattribute10 as jikchek, u.tenant_id, concat('top,Top,', d.dept_cd_path) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND UPPER(property_name) = 'PRIMARYLANG') AS primaryLang, u.loginCnt, u.extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, u.extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, u.extensionattribute14 as sabun, u.password_updatedt FROM TBL_USERMASTER u inner join tbl_deptMaster d on (u.tenant_id = d.tenant_id) WHERE (u.cn = #id# OR u.extensionattribute14 = #id#) AND u.tenant_id = #tenantId# and d.cn = #deptID#
password = #password#

select.isEmpty:
SELECT cn, password, displayname, displayname2, department, description, description2, title, title2, physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, company, company2, updatedt, extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, telephonenumber, mail, extensionattribute10 as jikchek, tenant_id, (SELECT concat('top,Top,', dept_cd_path) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = a.department AND tenant_id = #tenantId#) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND UPPER(property_name) = 'PRIMARYLANG') AS primaryLang, loginCnt, extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, extensionattribute14 as sabun, password_updatedt FROM TBL_USERMASTER a WHERE cn = #id# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
password = #password#
select.isNotEmpty:
SELECT u.cn, u.password, u.displayname, u.displayname2, d.cn department, d.displayname description, d.displayname2 description2, case u.department when #deptID# then u.title else (select title from tbl_addjobmaster where cn = #id# and deptid = #deptID# and tenant_id = #tenantId#) end as title, case u.department when #deptID# then u.title2 else (select title2 from tbl_addjobmaster where cn = #id# and deptid = #deptID# and tenant_id = #tenantId#) end as title2, d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 companyid, d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 company, d.COMPNM2 company2, u.updatedt, case u.department when #deptID# then u.extensionattribute1 else 'c=0;k=0;g=0;a=0;i=0;n=0;l=0;w=0;m=0;' end as rollinfo, u.telephonenumber, u.mail, u.extensionattribute10 as jikchek, u.tenant_id, concat('top,Top,', d.dept_cd_path) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND UPPER(property_name) = 'PRIMARYLANG') AS primaryLang, u.loginCnt, u.extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, u.extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, u.extensionattribute14 as sabun, u.password_updatedt FROM TBL_USERMASTER u inner join tbl_deptMaster d on (u.tenant_id = d.tenant_id) WHERE u.cn = #id# AND u.tenant_id = #tenantId# and d.cn = #deptID#
password = #password#

sqlMap.select: SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE cn != 'masteradmin' AND password IS NULL
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_CONNECTION_INFO( USERID, USERNM, USERNM2, DEPTID, DEPTNM, DEPTNM2, TITLE, TITLE2, COMPANYID, COMPANYNM, COMPANYNM2, CONNECTIP, CONNECTTIME, CONNECTBROWSER, CONNECTOS, CONNECTAGENT, TENANT_ID ) VALUES( #id#, #displayName1#, #displayName2#, #deptID#, #deptName1#, #deptName2#, #title1#, #title2#, #companyID#, #companyName1#, #companyName2#, #ip#, utc_timestamp(), #browser#, #os#, #agent#, #tenantId# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET ipaddress = #ip#, lastlogin = utc_timestamp(), logincnt = logincnt + 1 WHERE cn = #id# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET password = #password#, updatedt = utc_timestamp(), password_updatedt = utc_timestamp() WHERE cn = #id# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT SERVER_NAME, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_TENANT_SERVERNAME WHERE SERVER_NAME = #serverName#

SELECT cn, password, displayname, displayname2, department, description, description2, title, title2, physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, company, company2, updatedt, extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, telephonenumber, mail, extensionattribute10 as jikchek, tenant_id, (SELECT concat('top,Top,', dept_cd_path) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = a.department AND tenant_id = #tenantId#) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND UPPER(property_name) = 'PRIMARYLANG') AS primaryLang, loginCnt, extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, extensionattribute14 as sabun FROM TBL_USERMASTER a WHERE cn = #id# AND cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND tenant_id = #tenantId#

SELECT cn, password, displayname, displayname2, department, description, description2, title, title2, physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, company, company2, updatedt, extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, telephonenumber, mail, extensionattribute10 as jikchek, tenant_id, (SELECT concat('top,Top,', dept_cd_path) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = a.department AND tenant_id = #tenantId#) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND UPPER(property_name) = 'PRIMARYLANG') AS primaryLang, loginCnt, extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, extensionattribute14 as sabun FROM TBL_USERMASTER a WHERE (DEPARTMENT = #id# OR EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 LIKE CONCAT('%',#id#, '%')) AND cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND tenant_id = #tenantId#

SELECT cn, password, displayname, displayname2, department, description, description2, title, title2, physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, company, company2, updatedt, extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, telephonenumber, mail, extensionattribute10 as jikchek, tenant_id, (SELECT concat('top,Top,', dept_cd_path) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = a.department AND tenant_id = #tenantId#) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND UPPER(property_name) = 'PRIMARYLANG') AS primaryLang, loginCnt, extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, extensionattribute14 as sabun FROM TBL_USERMASTER a WHERE PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #company_id# AND cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
